series_metadata.series_description: Records include National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System permit applications, draft permits, and associated documents effective for a maximum of 5 years, regulating discharges of pollutants into waters of the state in accordance with Federal and State rules.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Keep six months request withdrawal of permit application or draft permit; or six months issuance or denial of final NPDES permit, unless an appeal of decision is pending. In which case, keep all appeals are complete ; Electronic: Keep six months request withdrawal of permit application or draft permit; or six months issuance or denial of final NPDES permit, unless an appeal of decision is pending. In which case, keep all appeals are complete
